title: Clicking Connect Board item should connect to the default item page and not the vertical pop-up

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Most of the time, when clicking on a connect board item (from the board mostly), a linear view of all the columns pops up. Instead, the default item page view tab of the connected item should pop up.

What are you trying to achieve

View the default item page view tab of the connected item.
